title: Conduct comprehensive inspection of park facilities
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Conduct comprehensive inspection of park facilities demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for comprehensive inspection of park facilities

pcs.text: Determine from operational request, specific facilities and equipment to be inspected and purpose of inspection
